rule_metadata.name: rdrleakdiag
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'rdrleakdiag' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule rdrleakdiag
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'rdrleakdiag' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "rdrleakdiag"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /rdrleakdiag\.exe\s\/p\s.{0,1000}\s\/o\s.{0,1000}\s\/fullmemdmp\s\/wait\s1/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
